# Vault Index (whole-vault-scope fixture root)

This no-frontmatter `vault-index.md` lives at the VAULT ROOT. Before the whole-
vault widening a no-project scan walked `repos/*` only, so this file (and its
C6 index-row bloat) was a false-negative — never scanned by any check. With the
broadened scope it is now scanned and the bloated row below flags via the
`vault-index.md` basename clause.

| Page | Summary |
|------|---------|
| Home |  |
